topic: Backend Framework Evaluation — Fintech Microservices Platform

market_data: GitHub repository metrics (March 2026): FastAPI 96.5k stars, NestJS 75k stars, Gin 88.3k stars, Actix-web 24.5k stars
LinkedIn Jobs US: FastAPI 600+ postings (602 confirmed)
technical_data: OpenTelemetry Python contrib: 51 instrumentation packages; FastAPI, gRPC, asyncpg, Redis, psycopg2 all present
OpenTelemetry Go contrib: otelgin, otelecho, otelgrpc — all provide metrics + traces
go-grpc-middleware: Prometheus, OTel, logging (zap/slog/zerolog/logrus), auth, retry, rate-limit, validation, panic-recovery
pgx Go PostgreSQL driver: v5, 13.6k stars, statement caching, COPY protocol, connection pooling
Benchmarks Game: Go vs Python ~70-100x faster CPU-bound; Rust vs Go ~2-4x faster CPU-bound
Python asyncio: I/O-bound optimized; CPU-bound requires thread/process delegation
SQLAlchemy 2.0 asyncio: asyncpg backend, per-request AsyncSession pattern, no greenlet overhead for simple queries
Actix-web: v4.13.0 (Feb 2026), Tokio-native, 72,800 dependents, MSRV Rust 1.88+
business_data: Notable adopters: FastAPI (Microsoft, Netflix, Uber, Cisco); NestJS (Mercedes-Benz, Red Hat, Sanofi); Go (Uber, Docker, Kubernetes, Cloudflare); Rust (Mozilla Push 20M WebSockets, Juspay fintech)
NestJS sponsors: Microsoft, Red Hat, JetBrains, Snyk, Mercedes-Benz
Go: language satisfaction 82.2% (2nd highest); adoption 14.4% professional developers
Rust: language satisfaction 83% (highest); adoption 12.6% all developers

data_gaps.reason: Page is JavaScript-rendered; scraping returned only page title
data_gaps.confidence_impact: Low — tier ordering (Rust > Go > NestJS > FastAPI) is consistent across multiple public summaries
data_gaps.mitigation: Cited as approximate ranges; recommendation does not depend on exact RPS numbers

data_gaps.gap: NestJS State of JS survey adoption data
data_gaps.confidence_impact: Low — NestJS GitHub/npm data (75k stars, 673k dependents, v11.1.17) is comprehensive
data_gaps.mitigation: Used GitHub metrics and LinkedIn data as proxy

data_gaps.gap: Fintech-specific Go/Rust production internal benchmarks (Stripe, Cloudflare)
data_gaps.confidence_impact: Low — Juspay (Rust/fintech) and Uber (Go/platform) documented as production case studies
data_gaps.mitigation: Public GopherCon talks and published FastAPI adopter list used

data_gaps.confidence_impact: Medium — assessed as 'requires manual interceptors' based on community knowledge; official docs could show better native support
data_gaps.mitigation: Recommend team evaluate NestJS OTel packages (@opentelemetry/instrumentation-nestjs-core) before finalizing

review_triggers: Team headcount reaches 15+ engineers — re-evaluate hiring market pressure
Any service exceeds p99 latency SLO for 30+ days — trigger Go migration evaluation
Python 3.14+ free-threaded mode (no-GIL) reaches production stability — re-evaluate FastAPI performance tier
Rust Actix-web OTel ecosystem reaches parity with Go — re-evaluate for cryptographic service
